接口 IBaseDocBuilderTemplate<T extends IDoc>

所有已知子接口:
IRpcDocBuilderTemplate<T>
所有已知实现类:
DocBuilderTemplate, GrpcDocBuilderTemplate, JavadocDocBuilderTemplate, RpcDocBuilderTemplate, WebSocketDocBuilderTemplate
public interface IBaseDocBuilderTemplate<T extends IDoc>
doc builder template interface.

  • 方法详细资料

    • getApiDoc

      isAsciidoc - is Asciidoc
      showJavaType - show java type
      paramsDataToTree - params data to tree
      config - ApiConfig
      javaProjectBuilder - JavaProjectBuilder
      返回:

    • setCssCDN

      default void setCssCDN(ApiConfig config, org.beetl.core.Template template)
      set css cdn
      参数:
      config - config
      template - template

    • bindingCommonVariable

      default void bindingCommonVariable(ApiConfig config, com.thoughtworks.qdox.JavaProjectBuilder javaProjectBuilder, org.beetl.core.Template template, boolean apiDocListEmpty)
      Binds common variables to the specified template in preparation for document generation. This method populates the template with essential configuration data, timestamps, and various lists derived from the provided configurations and project structure.
      参数:
      config - The API configuration object containing project name, version details, etc.
      javaProjectBuilder - A builder for the Java project used to parse project configurations.
      template - The template object to which variables will be bound.
      apiDocListEmpty - A flag indicating whether the API documentation list is empty.

    • allInOneDocName

      default String allInOneDocName(ApiConfig apiConfig, String fileName, String suffix)
      all in one doc name
      参数:
      apiConfig - api config
      fileName - file name
      suffix - suffix
      返回:
      all in one doc name

    • copyJQueryAndCss

      default void copyJQueryAndCss(ApiConfig config)
      Copies jQuery and CSS files to the output directory. This method is utilized during documentation generation to transfer essential CSS and JavaScript files from the resource directory to the output directory. It encompasses the all-in-one stylesheet, jQuery library, highlight.js, and ensures the documentation pages have the necessary styling and functionality.
      参数:
      config - An instance of ApiConfig carrying configuration details including the output path.

    • copyJarFile

      static void copyJarFile(String source, String target)
      Copies a file from a source path to a target path. This method is used to copy a file from a specified source path to a target path. It is primarily used to copy the all-in-one stylesheet and other supporting files to the output directory.
      参数:
      source - The source path of the file to be copied.
      target - The target path where the file will be copied.

    • buildErrorCodeDoc

      default void buildErrorCodeDoc(ApiConfig config, String template, String outPutFileName, com.thoughtworks.qdox.JavaProjectBuilder javaProjectBuilder)
      build error_code adoc.
      参数:
      config - api config
      template - template
      outPutFileName - output file
      javaProjectBuilder - javaProjectBuilder

    • buildErrorCodeDocTemplate

      default org.beetl.core.Template buildErrorCodeDocTemplate(ApiConfig config, String template, com.thoughtworks.qdox.JavaProjectBuilder javaProjectBuilder)
      build errorCode adoc template.
      参数:
      config - api config
      template - template
      javaProjectBuilder - javaProjectBuilder
      返回:
